creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #4)

Sorry, I just woke up and with my first cup of coffee read this on the sonarr discord:

Message here: https://discord.com/channels/383686866005917708/425373057188626433/1082383008486654084

As mark stated, the libmediainfo port is still broken, but in my opinion that one is easily fixed (patches exist, they have been tested)
Sorry for all the noise! and thanks a lot for all the help with this issue.
